doc_text:
## Proof of work for writing

With Handtyped, you can show the world that your work was human-written. For bloggers, Redditors, students, journalists, and everyone in between.

## How it works:

Handtyped is a markdown editor that only allows input from your physical keyboard. No copy and paste, no AI agents, and no [human typing pattern simulators](chromewebstore.google.com/detail/natural-typist-human-typi/mfdeophbahbbbonmgbdhchlcjmenhlfd). Anything written in Handtyped must truly be typed by hand.

Once you finish writing, Handtyped generates and publishes a millisecond-accurate replay of your writing process, keystroke by keystroke. Readers will be able to see every deletion, pause, and rewrite. 
For example, [here](replay.handtyped.app/6hPj7Bmr4aeTf6z4) is the replay for the text of this website. 

You could in theory build a robot to type on the keyboard, modify the client to produce fake logs, or copy from another screen and manually mimic believable typing patterns. At that point, however, faking it is about as much work as writing it.

But if you are putting that much effort to publish AI slop, you may as well write it yourself.

The controlled environment of Apple laptops allows us to precisely identify the source of input and reject anything other than the physical built in keyboard. Support for Chromebooks and other laptops is coming soon.
You deserve credit for your writing.

Handtyped allows you to demonstrate to the world that your writing is human-written, not AI generated.

## How it works:

The Handtyped app is a fully featured markdown editor that only allows input from your physical keyboard. No copy and paste, no openclaw, and no [human typing pattern simulators](chromewebstore.google.com/detail/natural-typist-human-typi/mfdeophbahbbbonmgbdhchlcjmenhlfd). Anything written in Handtyped must truly be typed by hand.

Once you finish writing, you can publish a millisecond-accurate replay of your writing process, keystroke by keystroke. Your readers will be able to see your thought process and the effort put into your writing. For example, [here](replay.handtyped.app/6hPj7Bmr4aeTf6z4) is the replay for the text of this website.

## A few limitations

- You could in theory build a robot to type on the keyboard, modify the client to produce fake logs, or copy from another screen and manually mimic believable typing patterns. At that point, however, faking it is about as much effort as writing it.

- Currently Handtyped only works on Apple Silicon laptops.
